summary: Tested SportLyo Sponsors & Donateurs commission (5% platform fee) and fiscal receipt (Cerfa 11580) features. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend displays fee breakdown, payment statuses, and action buttons correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height - non-blocking cosmetic issue

backend_payment_link_commission.POST /api/payments/create-link - updates: PASS - base_amount, platform_fee, total_amount, payment_link, payment_status stored
backend_payment_link_commission.POST /api/payments/create-link - creates: PASS - commission stored in commissions collection with status 'pending'
backend_payment_link_commission.POST /api/payments/create-link - validat: PASS - rejects missing source_id, zero/negative amounts

backend_confirm_payment.POST /api/payments/confirm-payment/{spon: PASS - marks payment as paid, generates receipt
backend_confirm_payment.POST /api/payments/confirm-payment - fis: PASS - creates entry with receipt_number RF-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX
backend_confirm_payment.POST /api/payments/confirm-payment - spo: PASS - updates payment_status to 'paid', adds receipt_number, paid_at

backend_pdf_receipt.GET /api/payments/receipt/{sponsor_id}/p: PASS - returns valid PDF with Cerfa 11580 format
backend_pdf_receipt.PDF sections: PASS - includes organisme beneficiaire, donateur, don details, cadre fiscal (articles 200/238 bis CGI)

frontend_sponsors_section.Hub card 'Sponsors & Donateurs': PASS - visible with Heart icon, rose-500 background
frontend_sponsors_section.Summary cards: PASS - Total sponsors, Montant total, Donateurs count
frontend_sponsors_section.Fee breakdown display: PASS - Shows 'Frais plateforme 5%' and 'Total facture' for sponsors with payment links
frontend_sponsors_section.Payment status 'En attente': PASS - amber colored for pending payments
frontend_sponsors_section.Payment status 'Paye': PASS - green with CheckCircle2 icon for paid sponsors
frontend_sponsors_section.Receipt number display: PASS - Shows 'Recu RF-xxx' for paid sponsors

frontend_action_buttons.Generer lien de paiement: PASS - data-testid='pay-link-sponsor-{id}' visible when no link exists
frontend_action_buttons.Copier lien: PASS - data-testid='copy-link-sponsor-{id}' visible when link exists and not paid
frontend_action_buttons.Confirmer paiement: PASS - data-testid='confirm-pay-{id}' visible when link exists and not paid
frontend_action_buttons.Telecharger recu fiscal: PASS - data-testid='download-receipt-{id}' visible when payment confirmed

seed_data_creation: Test sponsors (TEST_FeeVerify Corp, etc.) created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission & receipt features fully tested. PLATFORM_COMMISSION = 0.05 in deps.py. Payment link creates 2 line items in Square order. Confirm payment: updates sponsor.payment_status to 'paid', creates fiscal_receipts entry, updates commission.status to 'collected', sends email via Resend. PDF uses fpdf2 library with Cerfa 11580 format. Fee breakdown only shows on UI when sponsor has platform_fee > 0 (i.e., after payment link generation).

mocked_apis.Square payments: MOCKED - simulated checkout URLs used (no real Square transactions)
mocked_apis.Resend email: SANDBOX - emails sent to sandbox, not actually delivered
